cards.title: Representation and Fitness
cards.governance_note: Document candidate encoding, feasible solution space, fitness function, constraints, and proxy-risk review.

cards.title: Variation and Diversity
cards.governance_note: Track mutation, recombination, selection pressure, population diversity, convergence, and multi-seed performance.

cards.title: Validation and Safety
cards.governance_note: Use held-out tests, stress tests, reward-hacking checks, lineage records, and deployment monitoring.
